modules.module_title: Introduction to Nanny Profession, Child Development & Milestones
Toddler Care, Nutrition, Sleep Hygiene & Potty Training
Playtime Activities, Early Learning & Behavioral Guidance
Child Safety, First Aid, CPR & Emergency Management
Professional Ethics, Communication with Parents & Nanny Business Basics

questions.question: Nanny & Baby Care Professional (dai aur shishu dekhbhal) ka primary role kya hota hai?

options.A: Bache ki physical safety, nutrition, hygiene, emotional support aur development milestones me madad karna
options.B: Only house cleaning and washing clothes

questions.explanation: Nanny ka primary focus bache ki holistic growth, physical safety aur daily care par hota hai jo parents ke absence me bache ko safe environment de.

questions.question: Infant development milestones me, aamtaur par kis age par baby support ke sath baithna (sit with support) seekhta hai?

options.A: 6 to 8 Months (6 se 8 mahine)

questions.explanation: 6 se 8 mahine ke beech baby ke back aur neck muscles strong ho jate hain jisse wo support ke sath ya bina support ke baithna start kar deta hai.

questions.question: Infant formula milk (shishu ka doodh) prepare karne ke dauran baby bottles and nipples ko sterilize karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Harmful bacteria aur germs ko kill karne ke liye jo infant gastrointestinal infection aur diarrhea cause kar sakte hain
options.B: Bottle ka size bada karne ke liye directly

questions.explanation: Infants ka immune system bohot weak hota hai, isliye feed bottles aur utensils ko boil ya sanitize karke germs free rakhna mandatory hai.

questions.question: Prepared infant formula milk bottle ko mixing ke baad room temperature par maximum kitne time tak feed ke liye use kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Within 1 Hour (1 ghante ke andar, iske baad bacteria multiply hone lagte hain)

questions.explanation: Milk solution me bacteria room temperature par rapidly grow karte hain, isliye prepare kiya gaya formula 1 hour ke andar consume ya refrigerator me store kiya jana chahiye.

questions.question: Infants me 'SIDS' (Sudden Infant Death Syndrome) ke risk ko minimum karne ke liye baby sleeping position kya honi chahiye?

options.A: On their Back (पीठ ke bal seedha litana - Back to Sleep)
options.B: On their Stomach (pet ke bal litana)
options.C: On their side with heavy blankets

questions.explanation: Medical guidelines ke according baby ko back ke bal (seedha) litane se air paths clear rehte hain aur suffocation/SIDS ka risk drastically drop hota hai.

questions.question: Weaning (shishu ko solid food introduce karna) aamtaur par kis age se start karna chahiye?

options.A: At 6 Months (6 mahine ki aayu par, with pureed/mashed foods)

questions.explanation: 6 months tak baby ko mother breastmilk ki requirement hoti hai. Iske baad body growth aur developmental milestone checks ke liye solid soft foods introduce karna start kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Toddlers me potty training (toilet training) start karne ke liye readiness signs kya hote hain?

options.A: Diaper dry remains dry for 2 hours, showing interest in toilet seats, and communicating diaper wetness alerts

questions.explanation: Potty training toddler ke muscular controls aur communication readiness signals identify karne ke baad hi trigger ki jati hai.

questions.question: Baby care safety checks me choke hazard tools details checks me 3 saal se chote bacho ko kis size ke toys strictly avoid karne chahiye?

options.A: Small toys/balls passing through standard choke tester cylinder (chote parts/beads)

questions.explanation: Toddlers and infants items ko muuh me dalte hain, small parts windpipe block karke asphyxiation/choking cause kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar bache ke throat me koi object block ho jaye aur wo breath na kar paye (choking emergency) to kya immediate action karna chahiye?

options.A: Infant (under 1 year) ko forearm par facing down rakhkar alternate 5 Back Blows (peeth par thapthapana) aur 5 Chest Thrusts dena
options.B: Shake baby upside down continuously by legs
options.D: Wait for natural coughing for hours

questions.explanation: Correct choking rescue protocols back blows and chest thrusts hain jo air pressure generate karke airway object clear blockages remove karte hain.

questions.question: Professional Nanny ethics checks me parents ki absence me house keys aur baby security patterns data sharing guidelines checks kya hain?

options.A: Keep absolute confidentiality, never share keys/security codes or post baby photos on personal social media without parental consent
options.B: Share security codes with friends easily
options.C: Post daily status of baby updates publicly on internet portals

questions.explanation: Artisan child care requires maximum trust and safety. Protecting family privacy is fundamental nanny ethic standard.

questions.question: Toddlers sleep hygiene setups checks average daily sleep requirements range details typical average target?

options.A: 11 to 14 hours total (including 1-2 daytime naps)

questions.explanation: Toddlers brain and body muscle growth recovery requires structured 11-14 hours restful sleep setups.

questions.question: Newborn babies bath workflows 'Umbilical cord stump' (naabhi ki naal) drop drop-off care guidelines checks did umbilical cord area needs water immersion bathing?

options.A: No, only sponge baths (keep cord stump dry clean, avoid soaking in tub water until it falls off naturally)
options.B: Yes, rub heavily with soap daily in bath tubs
options.C: Umbilical cord must be cut daily

questions.explanation: Wet umbilical cord stump traps bacteria causing dangerous neonatal infections. Keeping it dry accelerates safe drop offs.

questions.question: Toddlers behavioral guidance setups 'Time Out' durations guidelines standard rule calculations?

options.A: 1 minute per year of child age (eg 3-year-old child time out limit is 3 minutes maximum in safe place)
options.B: Always 1 hour isolation in locked rooms

questions.explanation: Time outs calm emotional tantrums; exceeding child year age counts causes panic and defeats behavior learning loops.

questions.question: Baby nutrition setups 'Pureed food consistency progressions' which is best initial solid format?

options.A: Single ingredient thin runny purees (eg apple sauce, rice cereal paste, avoiding spice overlays)

questions.explanation: Infants gut transition requires thin single-ingredient inputs to test allergic triggers easily.

questions.question: Professional nanny business documentation templates 'Daily Log book' why shared with parents daily?

options.A: Tracks feeding times, diaper change counts, nap durations, and development logs to keep parents aligned

questions.explanation: Daily logs maintain transparent child updates communication, strengthening parent-nanny trust dynamics.

questions.question: Nanny & Baby Care Professional roles?

options.A: Bache ki physical safety, nutrition, hygiene, emotional support aur development milestones me madad karna
options.B: Only house cleaning and washing clothes

questions.explanation: Nanny ka primary focus bache ki holistic growth, physical safety aur daily care par hota hai jo parents ke absence me bache ko safe environment de.

options.A: 6 to 8 Months (6 se 8 mahine)

questions.explanation: 6 se 8 mahine ke beech baby ke back aur neck muscles strong ho jate hain jisse wo support ke sath ya bina support ke baithna start kar deta hai.

options.B: Share security codes with friends easily

options.B: Yes, rub heavily with soap daily in bath tubs
options.C: Umbilical cord must be cut daily

questions.question: Infant physical checks 'Dehydration check' why skin turgor test is performed on babies?

options.A: Gently pinching skin abdomen (if skin stays tented/slow return, baby is severely dehydrated and needs medical care)

questions.explanation: Skin elasticity drops rapidly under systemic water losses, skin pinch tenting is crucial baby dehydration sign.

questions.question: Toddler motor skills development 'Fine Motor Skills' vs 'Gross Motor Skills' stacking blocks falls under which category?

options.A: Fine Motor Skills (involves precise coordination of small hand/finger muscles)

questions.explanation: Stacking blocks, holding crayons, and cutting paper utilize small hand muscles, developing fine motor skills.

questions.question: Baby skin care hygiene 'Diaper Rash prevention' what barrier paste is recommended?

options.A: Zinc Oxide based rash cream (forms protective barrier blocking moisture and acidic waste contact)

questions.explanation: Zinc oxide paste is water insoluble skin protector, isolating baby dermis from wet diaper acidity.

questions.question: Child development milestones 'Stranger Anxiety' (naye logo se darr) typical age range onset?

options.A: 7 to 9 Months (lasts up to 2 years, normal developmental phase of social attachment)

questions.explanation: Stranger anxiety indicates baby is recognizing and forming primary attachments, feeling secure with regular caregivers.

questions.question: Baby care safety checks 'Electrical safety' childproofing wall outlets why plastic outlet plugs are inserted?

options.A: Prevents curious crawling babies/toddlers from inserting metal pins/fingers inside active sockets

questions.explanation: Baby fingers easily fit electrical wall slots. Outlets safety covers block access, preventing electric shock hazards.

questions.question: Infant physical checks dehydration?

options.A: Gently pinching skin abdomen (if skin stays tented/slow return, baby is severely dehydrated and needs medical care)

questions.explanation: Skin elasticity drops rapidly under systemic water losses, skin pinch tenting is crucial baby dehydration sign.

questions.question: Toddler motor skills fine?

options.A: Fine Motor Skills (involves precise coordination of small hand/finger muscles)

questions.explanation: Stacking blocks, holding crayons, and cutting paper utilize small hand muscles, developing fine motor skills.

questions.question: Baby skin care diaper rash?

options.A: Zinc Oxide based rash cream (forms protective barrier blocking moisture and acidic waste contact)

questions.explanation: Zinc oxide paste is water insoluble skin protector, isolating baby dermis from wet diaper acidity.

questions.question: Child development stranger anxiety?

options.A: 7 to 9 Months (lasts up to 2 years, normal developmental phase of social attachment)

questions.explanation: Stranger anxiety indicates baby is recognizing and forming primary attachments, feeling secure with regular caregivers.

questions.question: Baby care safety checks electrical?

options.A: Prevents curious crawling babies/toddlers from inserting metal pins/fingers inside active sockets

questions.explanation: Baby fingers easily fit electrical wall slots. Outlets safety covers block access, preventing electric shock hazards.

questions.question: Infant feeding 'Burping' (dakaar dilwana) why essential after formula feeds?

options.A: Releases swallowed air bubbles from baby stomach, preventing painful gas colic and spit-ups

questions.explanation: Sucking bottles traps air. Vertical burping support helps gas exit, avoiding abdominal pressure colic.

questions.question: Infant sleep hygiene 'Safe Swaddling' (kapde me lapetna) check why swaddle blanket must be loose around hips?

options.A: Allows natural hip joint bending legs movement to prevent developmental Hip Dysplasia (hip dislocation)
options.B: Swaddle must lock legs straight rigid always

questions.explanation: Forcing baby legs straight tightly binds hip sockets, causing structural joint misalignments (hip dysplasia).

questions.question: Toddler nutrition 'Choking hazard foods' which snack food should be cut into quarters before feeding?

options.A: Whole Grapes / Cherry Tomatoes (round slip shapes block windpipes easily)

questions.explanation: Round slippery grapes slide directly to throat, matching trachea diameters. Cutting lengthways prevents throat blockages.

questions.question: Child development 'Separation Anxiety' (parents se dur hone ka darr) how nanny helps baby cope?

options.A: Establish a consistent goodbye routine, divert baby attention with favorite toys immediately, and remain calm
options.B: Sneak out silently when baby is not looking
options.C: Force baby to cry in dark rooms to make strong

questions.explanation: Sneaking out breeds trust loss. Direct, calm goodbyes validate baby feelings while building routine expectations.

questions.question: Nanny business setups liability checks why 'First Aid & CPR certification' is basic requirement?

options.A: Validates ability to handle medical emergencies (choking, burns, zero pulse) and secure parent trust

questions.explanation: Emergency first responder certification is essential safety criteria in professional childcare contracts.

questions.question: Infant feeding burping gas?

options.A: Releases swallowed air bubbles from baby stomach, preventing painful gas colic and spit-ups

questions.explanation: Sucking bottles traps air. Vertical burping support helps gas exit, avoiding abdominal pressure colic.

options.B: Swaddle must lock legs straight rigid always

questions.explanation: Forcing baby legs straight tightly binds hip sockets, causing structural joint misalignments (hip dysplasia).

options.B: Sneak out silently when baby is not looking

questions.question: Nanny business first aid?

options.A: Validates ability to handle medical emergencies (choking, burns, zero pulse) and secure parent trust

questions.explanation: Emergency first responder certification is essential safety criteria in professional childcare contracts.

questions.question: Infant physical checks 'Fever margins' which temperature indicates fever in infants (under 3 months)?

options.A: 100.4 F (38 C) or higher (measured rectally, demands immediate doctor advice)

questions.explanation: Infant high fevers alert serious systemic infections. 100.4 F is standard pediatric warning threshold.

questions.question: Toddler behavioral guidance 'Positive Reinforcement' why preferred over scolding/spanking?

options.A: Praising good behavior encourages child to repeat it, building positive self-esteem and emotional bonds

questions.explanation: Praising constructive tasks channels toddler attention to cooperative goals, reducing defiance tendencies.

questions.question: Baby safety checks 'Poisoning hazards' where household detergents/cleaners must be stored?

options.A: Locked high cabinets out of reach of children (locked with child safety locks)

questions.explanation: Chemical bottles colored liquids attract toddlers. Locked top storage is standard home childproofing guideline.

questions.question: Child development milestones 'Social Smile' (responding to smile) typical age range?

options.A: 6 to 8 Weeks (1.5 to 2 months old baby)

questions.explanation: Social smiling marks early emotional visual attachments, baby communicating back social cues.

questions.question: Nanny communication etiquette 'Parent debrief session' when should it occur?

options.A: End of shift hand-off (briefly summarizing daily child milestones, nutrition and nap logs to parents)

questions.explanation: Shift hand-off debrief sessions build professional accountability, keeping parents fully informed.

questions.question: Infant physical checks fever?

options.A: 100.4 F (38 C) or higher (measured rectally, demands immediate doctor advice)

questions.explanation: Infant high fevers alert serious systemic infections. 100.4 F is standard pediatric warning threshold.

questions.explanation: Shift hand-off debrief sessions build professional accountability, keeping parents fully informed.

questions.question: Infant care adjustments 'Tummy Time' (pet ke bal litana) why critical under supervision?

options.A: Builds neck, shoulder and back muscles, preventing flat head syndrome (positional plagiocephaly)

questions.explanation: Supervised daily tummy sessions build muscle tone for rolling, sitting, and eventual crawling milestones.

questions.question: Infant nutrition 'Breastmilk storage' safe refrigeration limit range?

options.A: Up to 4 days inside standard clean refrigerator (4 C or below)
options.B: Up to 1 year on kitchen countertops

questions.explanation: Cold storage preserves bioactive components in breastmilk, preventing bacterial growth for up to 96 hours.

questions.question: Toddler behavior management 'Temper Tantrums' how to diffuse them calmly?

options.A: Stay calm, acknowledge their frustration, ensure physical safety, and ignore attention-seeking behavior
options.B: Scold them back loudly or match their screams
options.C: Give them whatever sweets they demand immediately

questions.explanation: Calm, consistent presence neutralizes toddler tantrums safely, avoiding rewarding destructive demands.

questions.question: Child safety home proofing 'Blind cords / Curtains strings' why tied up high?

options.A: Strangulation hazard (hanging loops easily trap toddler necks causing suffocation)
options.B: Protects curtains from baby paint stains

questions.explanation: Hanging loops are dangerous strangulation risks. Securing blind strings high prevents accidental baby entrapment.

questions.question: Nanny contract documentation 'Authorized Pickup List' why critical checklist?

options.A: Ensures children are only handed to verified family members/guardians approved by parents legally

questions.explanation: Strict pickup authorization checklists prevent unauthorized custody transfers, securing child safety.

questions.question: Infant care adjustments tummy?

options.A: Builds neck, shoulder and back muscles, preventing flat head syndrome (positional plagiocephaly)

questions.explanation: Supervised daily tummy sessions build muscle tone for rolling, sitting, and eventual crawling milestones.

options.B: Up to 1 year on kitchen countertops

questions.explanation: Cold storage preserves bioactive components in breastmilk, preventing bacterial growth for up to 96 hours.

options.B: Protects curtains from baby paint stains

questions.explanation: Strict pickup authorization checklists prevent unauthorized custody transfers, securing child safety.

questions.question: Infant safety checks 'Teething care' what is recommended to soothe baby gums?

options.A: Clean cold damp cloth or solid rubber teething rings (cold numbs gum swellings safely)
options.B: Applying honey directly to teething gums

questions.explanation: Teething rings or chilled washcloths provide safe pressure relief, avoiding toxic chemical gels.

questions.question: Toddler play activities 'Parallel Play' (samanantar khel) typical development stage characteristics?

options.A: Children play adjacent to each other but do not interact or share play goals (normal toddler social behavior)
options.B: Children organize complex board game rules together

questions.explanation: Parallel play is standard social developmental milestone in 2-3 year old toddlers before cooperative play starts.

questions.question: Baby safety locks 'Toilet lid lock' why installed inside bathrooms?

options.A: Prevents toddlers from opening lid, playing in dirty water, or falling inside head-first (drowning hazard)

questions.explanation: Toddlers are top-heavy and can tip head-first into toilets, toilet locks block access to drowning hazards.

questions.question: Child safety first aid 'Minor burn treatment' what is first immediate step?

options.A: Hold burned area under cool running tap water for 10-15 minutes (dissipates thermal heat from skin)
options.B: Apply toothpaste or heavy butter directly on blisters
options.D: Apply ice blocks directly for hours

questions.explanation: Running cool water cools burns safely, toothpaste traps heat inside, worsening tissue damage.

questions.question: Nanny professional borders 'Screen time guidelines' standard pediatric recommendation for under 2 years?

options.A: Zero screen time (except video calls with family, encouraging human interaction instead)

questions.explanation: Early screens impact child language and attention development; real-world visual-manual play is standard recommendation.

questions.question: Infant safety teething?

options.A: Clean cold damp cloth or solid rubber teething rings (cold numbs gum swellings safely)
options.B: Applying honey directly to teething gums

questions.explanation: Teething rings or chilled washcloths provide safe pressure relief, avoiding toxic chemical gels.

options.A: Children play adjacent to each other but do not interact or share play goals (normal toddler social behavior)
options.B: Children organize complex board game rules together

questions.explanation: Parallel play is standard social developmental milestone in 2-3 year old toddlers before cooperative play starts.

options.A: Prevents toddlers from opening lid, playing in dirty water, or falling inside head-first (drowning hazard)

questions.explanation: Toddlers are top-heavy and can tip head-first into toilets, toilet locks block access to drowning hazards.

options.B: Apply toothpaste or heavy butter directly on blisters
options.D: Apply ice blocks directly for hours

questions.explanation: Running cool water cools burns safely, toothpaste traps heat inside, worsening tissue damage.

questions.question: Nanny professional screen time?

options.A: Zero screen time (except video calls with family, encouraging human interaction instead)

questions.explanation: Early screens impact child language and attention development; real-world visual-manual play is standard recommendation.

questions.question: Infant sleep setups 'Crib safety rules' why stuffed animals and bumper pads are banned in cribs?

options.A: Suffocation risks (loose plush toys can block baby breathing paths if they roll face-first)
options.C: Toys interfere with baby height growth

questions.explanation: Cribs must have firm mattress and fitted sheet only; loose plush items pose high suffocation risks.

questions.question: Toddler transition steps 'Crib to bed' when should transition occur?

options.A: When toddler is able to climb out of crib safety bars (typically around 2 to 3 years)

questions.explanation: Crib climb-outs present severe fall injury hazards, demanding transition to low toddler floor beds.

questions.question: Child safety steps 'Rear-facing car seat' standard safety travel rule limit?

options.A: Rear-facing until at least 2 years old or reaching weight height maximums of seat

questions.explanation: Rear-facing car seats support infant necks and spines during deceleration crashes, reducing severe injury risks.

questions.question: Child first aid checks 'Fever fit / Febrile seizure' what is safety action rule?

options.A: Lay child on their side, clear surroundings of hard objects, do not insert anything in mouth, time the seizure
options.B: Hold child tight down to stop shaking
options.C: Insert metal spoon in mouth to prevent tongue bites
options.D: Give hot milk drinks during fit

questions.explanation: Febrile fits are caused by rapid body heat spikes. SIDE laying keeps airways clear; locking down muscles or placing objects in mouth can choke or injure.

questions.question: Nanny ethics loops 'Social media privacy codes' why posting client baby videos is prohibited?

options.A: Child safety and kidnapping risks (protects family privacy and digital foot-print integrity of child)

questions.explanation: Artisanal childcare ethics mandate absolute confidentiality; public posts create safety hazards and breach parental trusts.

options.A: Confirms readiness to handle life-safety emergencies, securing trust of prospective employers

questions.explanation: Ensuring up-to-date CPR and First Aid certifications protects infants while establishing nanny competence and market value.

questions.explanation: Medical guidelines ke according baby ko back ke bal (seedha) litane se air paths clear rehte hain aur suffocation/SIDS ka risk drastically drop hota hai.

questions.question: Weaning solid food introductions?

options.A: At 6 Months (6 mahine ki aayu par, with pureed/mashed foods)

questions.explanation: 6 months tak baby ko mother breastmilk ki requirement hoti hai. Iske baad body growth aur developmental milestone checks ke liye solid soft foods introduce karna start kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Toddlers toilet training readiness?

options.A: Diaper dry remains dry for 2 hours, showing interest in toilet seats, and communicating diaper wetness alerts

questions.explanation: Potty training toddler ke muscular controls aur communication readiness signals identify karne ke baad hi trigger ki jati hai.

questions.question: Baby safety choke hazard size?

options.A: Small toys/balls passing through standard choke tester cylinder (chote parts/beads)

questions.explanation: Toddlers and infants items ko muuh me dalte hain, small parts windpipe block karke asphyxiation/choking cause kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Baby choking rescue protocols?

options.A: Infant (under 1 year) ko forearm par facing down rakhkar alternate 5 Back Blows (peeth par thapthapana) aur 5 Chest Thrusts dena
options.B: Shake baby upside down continuously by legs
options.D: Wait for natural coughing for hours

questions.explanation: Correct choking rescue protocols back blows and chest thrusts hain jo air pressure generate karke airway object clear blockages remove karte hain.

questions.question: Professional Nanny ethics confidentiality checks?

options.A: Keep absolute confidentiality, never share keys/security codes or post baby photos on personal social media without parental consent
options.B: Share security codes with friends easily
options.C: Post daily status of baby updates publicly on internet portals

questions.explanation: Artisan child care requires maximum trust and safety. Protecting family privacy is fundamental nanny ethic standard.
